ard.sol":{"keccak256":"0xf980daa263b661ab8ddee7d4fd833c7da7e7995e2c359ff1f17e67e4112f2236","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://7448ab095d6940130bcf76ba47a2eab14148c83119523b93dd89f6d84edd6c02","dweb:/ipfs/QmawrZ4voKQjH3oomXT3Kuheb3Mnmo2VvVpxg8Ne5UJUrd"]}},"version":1}

params.grantId: ID of the grant to approve.

params.recipient: Address that will receive streamed funds.

params._endDate: Timestamp when the grant stream ends (0 for no end date).
params._finalReleaseRequired: Whether the last 10% requires community approval.
params.recipient: Address that will receive streamed funds.

returns._0: Grant details with final release flags.
True if the nullifier has been used.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

returns._0: True if final release is required and not yet approved.

params._required: True to enforce KYC; false to allow permissionless grants.

params._enabled: True to enable ZK-proof mode, false to disable.

params._zkVerifier: Address of ZKKYCVerifier, or address(0) to disable.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params.grantId: ID of the grant to update.

params.nullifier: The nullifier hash to mark as used.

addCommitment(bytes32).notice: Add a commitment to the Merkle tree (for ZK-SNARK integration).

approveFinalRelease(uint256).notice: Community governance approves the final release for grants with finalReleaseRequired flag.         This allows the last 10% to be claimed after a successful project launch vote.

claim(uint256,uint256).notice: Recipient claims `amount` from their grant.         Applies the 0.01% sustainability tax when cumulative volume >= VOLUME_THRESHOLD.         If finalReleaseRequired is enabled and grant has ended, last 10% requires community approval.

claimWithZKProof(uint256,uint256,bytes32.notice: Claim funds using ZK-proof for privacy-preserving payout.         This is a foundation function for future ZK-SNARK integration.         Security researchers and anonymous builders can use this for private claims.

closeGrant(uint256).notice: Funder closes the grant and reclaims remaining balance.

createGrant(address).notice: Backward-compatible createGrant without final release parameters.

createGrant(address,uint256,bool).notice: Create a new grant by depositing ETH.

getGrantDetails(uint256).notice: Get detailed grant information including final release status.

isNullifierUsed(bytes32).notice: Check if a nullifier has been used (prevents double-spending).

kycRequired().notice: When true, both the recipient at grant creation and the claimer         at claim time must be verified in zkVerifier.

merkleRoot().notice: Merkle root of commitments (for future ZK-SNARK integration)

nullifiers(bytes32).notice: Nullifier map to prevent double-spending in ZK proofs

requiresFinalApproval(uint256).notice: Check if a grant requires final community approval for the last 10%.

setKYCRequired(bool).notice: Owner toggles whether KYC verification is required for grants.         Requires zkVerifier to be set before enabling.

setZKVerifier(address).notice: Owner sets or clears the ZK-KYC verifier contract.

topUp(uint256).notice: Funder tops up an existing grant.

updateMerkleRoot(bytes32).notice: Update Merkle root (called by owner or ZK proof verifier).

updateRecipient(uint256,address).notice: Allows the current recipient to transfer the grant to a new recipient.         This is useful for moving grants into a Management Vault or Consolidator.

useNullifier(bytes32).notice: Use a nullifier to prevent double-spending in ZK proofs.

zkProofEnabled().notice: Flag to enable/disable ZK-proof based withdrawals

zkVerifier().notice: Optional ZK-KYC verifier. address(0) = KYC checks disabled.
